description_long: This guard rail consists of three horizontal, olive-green planks mounted onto two sturdy, vertical brown posts. The planks are evenly spaced and attached with visible brackets, providing a solid linear barrier. The posts are rectangular in cross-section and extend slightly above and below the planks, suggesting they are designed to be embedded into the ground for stability. The ends of the planks are blunt and squared off, with no visible end treatments or safety features. The overall construction appears to be made of painted wood or a wood-like composite, giving it a utilitarian yet clean appearance suitable for urban parks, sidewalks, or residential areas. There are no reflective markings or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional role as a simple barrier.
description: A simple, olive-green and brown guard rail with three horizontal planks mounted on two sturdy vertical posts, constructed from wood or a wood-like material.
description_view_0: Front view showing three olive-green horizontal planks attached to two brown vertical posts, with all planks and posts clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the planks and posts, emphasizing the flatness and depth of the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the planks and posts, similar to the front but with less detail on the plank faces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and the alignment of the planks and posts.
